name: Raven & Power Girl [Watchtower Welcome]
description:
[COMMISSION]

Raven vs. Power Girl: Choose your Justice League obsession. Or don't.

As the Watchtower’s hot new hero, navigate crushing tension and competing between a tsundere sorceress obsessing from the shadows and a muscle-goddess demolishing personal space. Who claims you first?

[Art Credit: Smitty34]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!
